source.name: Chapter 1.2: 1.4 Test Your Knowledge - What is an Action

answers.answer: A predefined text message defined under responses in the domain
Custom Python code that the agent can execute (e.g. calculations, APIs, dynamic logic)
A flow step that collects user input
A configuration file that defines agent intents

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT define what an action is in Rasa
source.guidance: An action is custom Python code that your agent can execute. Actions allow the agent to do more than send predefined text—they can perform calculations, access databases, call APIs, and run any Python logic you write. Predefined text is handled by responses (utter_*); actions are defined in Python files in the actions/ folder and registered in the domain.
